HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT DAMON GARRISON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. DAMON J GARRISON HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON; CLERK: JIROQUE; REPORTER: LETICIA PEREZ, CSR #7782 (206)
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD, CASE SETTLED. JUDGE PRO TEM STANLEY BAIR, CLERK NANCY REGAS, COURT REPORTER ARLENE HOWELL, CSR#2542 (218).
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF DAMON J GARRISON ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-22-2007 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: VELVET A. CHANG, ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF BAY AREA F.I., LLC
FLOYD CHAPMAN, LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY, FOR DEFENDANT DAMON J. GARRISON.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. SETTLEMENT REACHED ON THE RECORD AND STIPULATION FILED THIS DATE. PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED RESTITUTION OF THE PROPERTY AT 6246 THIRD STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124. DEFENDANT AGREES TO VACATE THE PROPERTY ON OR BEFORE 6-1-07. IF DEFENDANT VACATES THE PROPERTY BY 6-1-07, PLAINTIFF WAIVES ALL UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES AND UNPAID RENT THRU THAT DATE AND PLAINTIFF TO FILE A DISMISSAL. IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT VACATE THE PROPERTY ON OR BEFORE 6-1-07, JUDGMENT MAY BE ENTERED AND A MONEY JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $18,000 WILL ENTER. DEPOSIT OF $1750 IS FORFEITED. EACH PARTY TO PAY THEIR OWN ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS.

Judge Pro Tem: Stanley Bair, Clerk: Nancy Regas, Court Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542 (218)

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Mar-21-2007 Denied
